meaning: TimTrack runs first for Hough ROItype.
Forward UltraTrack/KLT runs before state estimation.
State estimation is called after UltraTrack returns.
KLT propagates fascicle from previous fas_x/fas_y inside UltraTrack.
Raw KLT fascicle x is copied to fas_x_original before state estimation.
Raw KLT fascicle y is copied to fas_y_original before state estimation.
State estimation function starts after the tracking function.
Fascicle Kalman state estimator modifies the tracked geometry later.
